body_txt: Fire, Ice, and Lightning — the definitive trio of Elemental Attacks ; the core of offensive magic among the Stock RPG Spells , used in nigh-all videogames that were inspired by the original Dungeons & Dragons and quite a large number that aren't. If you have attack spells , Magitek , psychokinetic abilities , or even Mons , there will be one each of fire, ice, and lightning, all of which are otherwise equal in power or usefulness. They're usually Color-Coded for Your Convenience . Fire is always red , ice is almost always blue , and lightning is usually yellow . These are the three primary colors on the color wheel, and these powers are the all-time number-one origin of Palette Swap Underground Monkeys . For more about the potential causes of this trope and how it can interact with other elements or systems, see the Analysis page . For exclusive users, please consult Playing with Fire , An Ice Person , Shock and Awe (and sometimes Psycho Electro ). For other sets of Elemental Powers , see Classical Elements Ensemble , Fire/Water Juxtaposition , Fire, Water, Wind , Lightning/Fire Juxtaposition , Fire/Ice Duo and Land, Sea, Sky .
